lore:quest.name: The Healer's Harvest
lore:quest.description: Liora Dawnpetal's infirmary shelves are bare on the eve of a siege. Gather 12 sweet berries for salves and 4 spider eyes for pain-quieting tinctures.
steps: Speak with Liora Dawnpetal and accept the quest.
Gather 12 sweet berries from bushes in the taiga.
Collect 4 spider eyes from spiders at night.
Return to Liora and turn in the supplies through her dialogue.
